description: Allowlist of accepted surviving mutants, keyed by contract crate. Each entry is a triaged survivor that CI will not fail the build on. New surviving mutants in security-critical paths (see security-critical-paths.yml) that are NOT listed here block the merge. Add an entry only after a maintainer has reviewed the survivor and decided it's an acceptable gap (e.g. genuinely equivalent mutant) or filed a follow-up to kill it.
